content.speakerText: So just to confirm—I can borrow 10 books, access JSTOR with my student login, and book rooms online?
content.speakerTextCn: 我确认下：能借10本书，用学号登录JSTOR，还能在线订房间？

options.text: I'm not sure, you should check the website.
That sounds too good to be true.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Exactly! You're all set.' 是对确认信息的标准积极回应，语气礼貌且确认无误。干扰项 'I'm not sure...' 表示不确定，不符合确认场景；'That sounds too good to be true.' 表达怀疑，不恰当；'Why are you asking again?' 显得不耐烦，违反礼貌原则。

content.speakerText: I just want to make sure I got everything right—I can use the library after 8 PM, and the Wi-Fi is free for students, right?
content.speakerTextCn: 我只是想确认一下我有没有记错——图书馆晚上8点后还能用，学生Wi-Fi是免费的，对吧？

options.text: That's correct. Everything's confirmed. Have a wonderful evening!
I think so, but you better ask someone else.
No, you're wrong. Library closes at 6 PM.
I don't care what you think.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'That's correct. Everything's confirmed. Have a wonderful evening!' 完美匹配道别确认场景：确认信息 + 礼貌结束。干扰项 'I think so...' 表达不确定，不符合确认职责；'No, you're wrong.' 太直接生硬；'I don't care...' 极不礼貌，完全违背场景原则。

content.speakerText: Just to double-check—I can reschedule my appointment until next week, and I won’t be charged any fee?
content.speakerTextCn: 我再确认一下——我可以把预约改到下周，而且不会被收费，对吗？

options.text: Yes, absolutely. No worries at all. Enjoy your week!
I have no idea, call customer service.
You should have thought of that earlier.
I guess so, but don't blame me if something goes wrong.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Yes, absolutely. No worries at all. Enjoy your week!' 是标准的确认+安抚+道别表达，自然且专业。干扰项 'I have no idea...' 推卸责任；'You should have thought...' 指责对方；'I guess so...' 表达犹豫，削弱信任，都不符合道别确认场景的积极、确定、礼貌要求。

content.template: So, just to confirm—I can borrow 10 books, access JSTOR with my student login, and book rooms online? — Exactly! You're all ___ .
content.hint: 这是对确认信息后表示‘一切就绪’的固定表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：You're all set（一切准备就绪）

content.template: I just want to make sure—I can pick up my package tomorrow and it’s free? — ___ good. Have a great day!
content.hint: 这是一个简洁、口语化的确认回应，常用于非正式场合

content.template: To confirm, the meeting is at 3 PM on Friday in Room 205? — ___ right. See you then!
content.hint: 这是口语中常用的、轻松的确认词，常用于日常对话

content.speakerText: So just to confirm—I can borrow 10 books, access JSTOR with my student login, and book rooms online?
content.speakerTextCn: 我确认下：能借10本书，用学号登录JSTOR，还能在线订房间？
expectedAnswers: Yep, that's right. Any other questions?
All good. Have a great day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认信息，消除对方疑虑
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当的确认词汇（如 exactly, yup, all good）
表达自然度：语气友好，符合口语习惯，结尾有礼貌道别

content.speakerText: Just to make sure—I can use the gym until 10 PM, and I don't need to reserve a slot in advance, right?
content.speakerTextCn: 我确认一下——我可以使用健身房到晚上10点，而且不需要提前预约，对吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, that's correct. You're all set!
Yep, no reservation needed. Enjoy your workout!
Absolutely! The gym is open until 10 PM for all students.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确确认所有信息点（开放时间、无需预约）
语言准确性：使用正确动词搭配（be open until, need to reserve）
表达自然度：使用口语化确认词（yes, yup, absolutely）并自然结尾

content.speakerText: So, just to confirm—I’ll receive the email confirmation by tomorrow, and I can cancel up to 24 hours before the event without penalty?
content.speakerTextCn: 我再确认一下——我明天会收到邮件确认，而且我可以在活动前24小时内免费取消，对吗？
expectedAnswers: That's right. You'll get the email by tomorrow, and cancellation is free up to 24 hours in advance. Have a great day!
Confirmed! Email coming tomorrow, no penalty for canceling within 24 hours.
All good on both counts. Let me know if you need anything else!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整确认两个信息点（邮件接收、取消政策）
语言准确性：使用专业表达（penalty, in advance, confirmed）
表达自然度：语气专业但亲切，结尾有礼貌，避免机械重复
